findings.text: Email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 attaches a file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The extracted text of both NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 is identical and does not contain the binary content of the attached Student Licence PDF.
Binary extraction tool was not executed; the embedded PDF content remains unextracted. The extracted text artifacts only captured the email body, not the attachment.

proposed_artifacts.content: Binary extraction of the embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 was not performed because the extracted text artifacts did not contain the attachment binary. The original PDF source files (NAP-SRC-0028.pdf, NAP-SRC-0029.pdf) likely contain the embedded PDF as an attachment. A follow-up task is proposed to use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach or similar) to extract the embedded PDF from the original source files.
proposed_artifacts.title: Binary Extraction Report for Student Licence PDF

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach or similar) to extract the embedded 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the original PDF source files NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029. The extracted text artifacts do not contain the attachment binary. The original PDFs are located at paths: 01-sources/contracts-and-accommodation/NAP-SRC-0028 - Edinburgh Napier University Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf and 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0029 - Email - Elbushra, Anfal - Outlook.pdf. Save the extracted PDF as a new source artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF using binary extraction tool from original PDF sources

summary: Extracted text from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 shows an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaching a 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'. The extracted text does not contain the content of that embedded PDF. The binary extraction tool was not invoked; no embedded PDF binary data is present in the extracted text artifacts. A follow-up task is proposed to attempt binary extraction from the original PDF source files.

uncertainties.description: The content of the embedded 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' is unknown; it was not extracted by pdf_text extraction.
